translations.es: La cartera siempre toca el timbre temprano.
translations.zh-Hans: 女邮递员总是很早按门铃。
translations.yue: 女郵差成日好早就撳門鐘。
translations.ru: Почтальон всегда рано звонит в дверь.
translations.pt: A carteira sempre toca a campainha cedo.
translations.tr: Postacı her zaman erkenden zil çalar.
translations.vi: Cô đưa thư luôn bấm chuông sớm.
translations.ar: ساعية البريد دائماً تقرع الجرس مبكراً.
translations.nl: De postbode belt altijd vroeg aan.
translations.uk: Листоноша завжди рано дзвонить у двері.
translations.hi: डाकिया हमेशा जल्दी घंटी बजाती है.
translations.pl: Listonoszka zawsze wcześnie dzwoni do drzwi.
translations.el: Η ταχυδρόμος χτυπάει πάντα νωρίς το κουδούνι.
translations.nb: Postbudet ringer alltid tidlig på døra.
translations.id: Petugas pos selalu menekan bel lebih awal.
translations.sv: Brevbäraren ringer alltid tidigt på dörren.
translations.da: Postbuddet ringer altid tidligt på døren.
translations.ja: 女性の郵便屋さんはいつも早くチャイムを鳴らします。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive (‘to ring [a bell]’).
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb.
Temporal adverb; sentence-level/time adjunct meaning ‘early’.

sentences.target: Ich winke der Briefträgerin vor dem Haus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvɪŋkə deːɐ ˈbʁiːftrɛːɡəʁɪn foːɐ deːm haʊ̯s/

translations.de: Ich winke der Briefträgerin vor dem Haus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvɪŋkə deːɐ ˈbʁiːftrɛːɡəʁɪn foːɐ deːm haʊ̯s/
translations.en: I wave to the mailwoman in front of the house.
translations.es: Saludo con la mano a la cartera frente a la casa.
translations.fr: Je fais signe à la factrice devant la maison.
translations.it: Saluto la postina con la mano davanti a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在房子前向女邮递员挥手。
translations.yue: 我喺屋前向女郵差揮手。
translations.pt: Eu aceno para a carteira em frente à casa.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫy tay chào cô đưa thư trước nhà.
translations.nl: Ik zwaai naar de postbode voor het huis.
translations.hu: A ház előtt intek a postásnőnek.
translations.hi: मैं घर के सामने डाकिया को हाथ हिलाता हूँ.
translations.el: Κουνάω το χέρι στην ταχυδρόμο μπροστά στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg vinker til postbudet foran huset.
translations.id: Saya melambaikan tangan kepada petugas pos di depan rumah.
translations.sv: Jag vinkar till brevbäraren framför huset.
translations.ro: Îi fac cu mâna poștașei în fața casei.
translations.da: Jeg vinker til postbuddet foran huset.
translations.ja: 家の前で女性の郵便屋さんに手を振ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; governs a dative experiencer (‘jemandem winken’).
Definite article; dative singular feminine; marks the indirect object NP.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; head of the indirect object NP.
Preposition governing dative to express static location.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition ‘vor’ (locative adjunct).

sentences.target: Mein Sohn hilft der Briefträgerin kurz.

translations.de: Mein Sohn hilft der Briefträgerin kurz.
translations.en: My son helps the mailwoman briefly.
translations.es: Mi hijo le ayuda un momento a la cartera.
translations.fr: Mon fils aide un instant la factrice.
translations.it: Mio figlio aiuta la postina per un attimo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我儿子帮女邮递员一下。
translations.pt: Meu filho ajuda a carteira por um instante.
translations.tr: Oğlum postacıya kısa süre yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Con trai tôi giúp cô đưa thư một chút.
translations.nl: Mijn zoon helpt de postbode even.
translations.uk: Мій син на хвильку допомагає листоноші.
translations.hu: A fiam egy kicsit segít a postásnőnek.
translations.hi: मेरा बेटा डाकिया की थोड़ी मदद करता है.
translations.pl: Mój syn na chwilę pomaga listonoszce.
translations.el: Ο γιος μου βοηθάει την ταχυδρόμο για λίγο.
translations.id: Anak saya membantu petugas pos sebentar.
translations.sv: Min son hjälper brevbäraren en kort stund.
translations.ro: Fiul meu o ajută pe poștașă puțin.
translations.cs: Můj syn na chvilku pomůže pošťačce.
translations.ja: 息子が女性の郵便屋さんを少し手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular masculine; agrees with ‘Sohn’.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a dative object (‘jemandem helfen’).
Definite article; dative singular feminine; marks the recipient/beneficiary.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; indirect object of ‘hilft’.
Adverb of manner/time modifying the verb; means ‘briefly/for a short time’.

sentences.target: Die Briefträgerin kennt meinen Hund schon.

translations.de: Die Briefträgerin kennt meinen Hund schon.
translations.en: The mailwoman already knows my dog.
translations.es: La cartera ya conoce a mi perro.
translations.fr: La factrice connaît déjà mon chien.
translations.it: La postina conosce già il mio cane.
translations.ko: 우편배달원은 우리 집 강아지를 이미 알고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 女邮递员已经认识我的狗了。
translations.yue: 女郵差已經識得我隻狗。
translations.pt: A carteira já conhece meu cachorro.
translations.he: הדוורית כבר מכירה את הכלב שלי.
translations.vi: Cô đưa thư đã biết con chó của tôi rồi.
translations.nl: De postbode kent mijn hond al.
translations.hu: A postásnő már ismeri a kutyámat.
translations.hi: डाकिया मेरे कुत्ते को पहले से जानती है.
translations.el: Η ταχυδρόμος ήδη ξέρει τον σκύλο μου.
translations.id: Petugas pos sudah mengenal anjing saya.
translations.ja: 女性の郵便屋さんはもううちの犬を知っています。
